query: Using the grounded clip and dense-caption evidence only, determine how many side steps the woman in gray performs and how many ball tosses she performs during the Inner City Tennis volunteering sequence, then give the ratio of side steps to ball tosses.
text_contexts:
A close-up shot shows a dark blue sign with colorful text. The sign reads 'HOME OF INNER CITY TENNIS @ REED SWEATT FAMILY TENNIS CENTER' in white, yellow, pink, and light blue letters. A chain-link fence is visible behind the sign.; speech: just seeing these kids kind of latch on to a new opportunity.; acoustics: 1) Tone of speech: Reflective, slightly emotional. 2) Background sounds or music: Faint ambient sounds.; HOME OF INNER CITY TENNIS @ REED SWEATT FAMILY TENNIS CENTER; attributes: camera_state: The camera is static, holding a close-up, slightly angled shot of the sign., video_background: The background consists of a dark chain-link fence and some green foliage at the bottom., storyline: This shot establishes the location of the upcoming tennis drill, identifying it as the Inner City Tennis center., shooting_style: This is a static establishing shot. A woman in a pink shirt and a man in a grey t-shirt walk past the sign. The woman is carrying a tennis racket over her shoulder. The man is holding a tennis ball.; speech: to play.; acoustics: 1) Tone of speech: Hopeful. 2) Background sounds or music: Ambient outdoor sounds.; attributes: camera_state: The camera remains static as the two individuals walk from right to left across the frame., video_background: The background is the same chain-link fence and the 'Inner City Tennis' sign., storyline: This segment introduces the main characters, a man and a woman, who are arriving at the tennis center, setting the scene for the drill., shooting_style: This is a continuation of the static establishing shot.

A female instructor in a grey t-shirt and black shorts stands on a tennis court, smiling as she tosses a tennis ball up to a young girl in a pink shirt. The instructor is demonstrating a forehand swing to the girl.; speech: and just the smiles on their face when they kind of...; acoustics: 1) Tone of speech: Cheerful, encouraging. 2) Background sounds or music: Faint sounds of activity in the background.; attributes: camera_state: The camera is at a medium distance, focusing on the instructor and the young girl. The shot is static., video_background: The scene is an indoor tennis court with a large blue curtain in the background. The words 'INNER CITY TENNIS' are visible on the wall., storyline: The video begins with a tennis instructor teaching a young girl the basics of the sport, setting a positive and encouraging tone., shooting_style: This is a standard shot establishing the main action. A close-up shot focuses on the hands of a young girl in a pink shirt as she holds a tennis racket. She is practicing her grip and swing motion, with the net and another player's back visible in the blurred background.; speech: you know, hit a forehand for the first time or, you know, something just clicks in their head where they're like, 'Oh my god, I know how to do this.'; acoustics: 1) Tone of speech: Reflective, excited. 2) Background sounds or music: None.; attributes: camera_state: The camera is positioned for a close-up on the girl's hands and racket, with a shallow depth of field that blurs the background., video_background: The background is a blurred view of the tennis court, including the net and another child., storyline: This shot emphasizes the details of the young player's learning process, focusing on the fundamental grip and swing., shooting_style: This is a close-up insert shot to highlight a specific detail. The instructor, now with a more serious expression, stands on the court. She tosses a ball and prepares to hit it, demonstrating a forehand swing for a group of children. A boy in a green shirt is in the foreground, and another girl is to the side.; acoustics: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: Faint background chatter.; attributes: camera_state: The camera is at a medium distance, capturing the instructor from the waist up as she prepares to hit the ball. The shot is static., video_background: The background is a large blue curtain. The words 'INNER CITY TENNIS' are clearly visible on the wall behind the instructor., storyline: The instructor continues her lesson, demonstrating the correct form for the children, showing her role as a mentor., shooting_style: This is a standard medium shot.
